Full Service BBQ Catering | Dba Barbecue – Atlanta, GA
top of page
ORDER HERE
Authentic Smoke with a Southern Soul Since 2009
Located just east of Chastain Park, DBA Barbecue has been a neighborhood staple. Enjoy classic pulled pork, ribs, brisket, and smoked wings. Hang around with a cold beer or margarita in hand!
Smokin' since 2009
Located just east of Chastain Park, DBA Barbecue is built on the foundations of southern hospitality and authentic wood-fired flavor. Whether you're joining us for our award-winning St. Louis Ribs, smoky brisket, or a round of house margaritas with friends, you'll find a welcoming atmosphere that feels like home. Since our doors opened in 2009, we've been dedicated to the craft of real BBQ and the community that gathers around it.
The Pit  Master's Favorites
At DBA Barbecue, everything is crafted in-house from start to finish. Our meats are seasoned by hand and slow-smoked low and slow over hickory wood, allowing the natural smoke to slowly penetrate each cut. The hickory imparts a subtle, slightly sweet flavor that enhances the richness of the meat without overpowering it. The result is tender, juicy barbecue with a deep smoke ring, authentic flavor, and the kind of texture that only comes from patience and tradition.
Signature Smoked Wings
Our legendary wings are marinated for 24 hours, smoked over hickory and apple for a smokey flavor. Served plain or tossed with various flavors. Especially, lemon pepper!.
Order Wing Platters Here
Build your own BBQ potato
St Louis Ribs
Whether you prefer your ribs sauced and sticky, or keep that sauce on the side our ribs are the best finger food around. Atlanta loves Ribs!
The DBA Margarita is the best way to wind down
DBA Catering
Signature BBQ Catering
Bring the authentic pit-master's touch to your doorstep. From corporate luncheons to social gatherings, our catering service serves authentic BBQ and Southern comfort food with professional and friendly service.
